case_title: KIENAST, RONNIE VS STARVING STUDENTS, INC.

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SENT PAPERS TO JUDGE TO BE SIGNED.
COPY OF CORRESPONDANCE FROM STARVING STUDENTS TO MR. KIENAST.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-18-2001, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO OCT-02-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 EMERGENCY DEAD IN MY FAMILY I HAVE TO TRAVEL TO SWITZERLAND.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KIENAST, RONNIE AS TO DEFENDANT STARVING STUDENTS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAILING TO STARVING STUDENTS, INC. RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIENAST, RONNIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STARVING STUDENTS, INC. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $27.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,527.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-02-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-13-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH SETTLEMENT, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 11/13/01 AT 10AM, THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.
